user.title: Connect JARVIS
user.description: Configure JARVIS for conversation. Most of the tuning happens afterward via the Configure button.

data_description.api_key: Groq keys start with gsk_... / OpenAI with sk-... / Gemini from Google AI Studio

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the LLM API. Check your network and base URL.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: JARVIS is already configured. Use the Configure button to update settings.
abort.import_failed: Could not read jarvis_config.json. Check the addon logs.

init.title: JARVIS — Core
init.description: Step 1 of 3: persona, directive, and conversation model.

data.use_hass_api: Enable home control (lights, climate, locks, etc.)

routing.title: JARVIS — Routing
routing.description: Step 2 of 3: pick which HA areas are bedrooms (for sleep detection), which media_player group to use for broadcasts, and your phone notify service.

data.bedroom_areas: Bedroom areas (for sleep detection during quiet hours)
data.broadcast_group: Broadcast speaker group (typically your home Cast group)

data_description.bedroom_areas: Any presence sensor in these areas fires sleep mode during quiet hours.
data_description.broadcast_group: Used for critical and high-urgency announcements.
data_description.notify_service: Used when you're away from home or asleep.

observer.title: JARVIS — Observer Mode
observer.description: Step 3 of 3: proactive awareness. JARVIS watches your home and speaks up when something's worth noting. Requires a Gemini API key (billing-enabled recommended).
